name: Fine Organic Industries Limited
summary: Fine Organic Industries Limited manufactures and sells oleochemical-based additives in India and internationally. The company offers food additives, such as emulsifiers, anti-fungal agents, and other specialty additives; and plastic additives, including disperse agents, slip agents, anti-stats, lubricants, antifogging, processing aids, anti-stats, and flow improvers additives. It also provides additives for rubber, cosmetics and pharmaceutical, paints and inks, textiles, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Fine Organic Industries Private Limited. Fine Organic Industries Limited was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
